block_01: When was the last time you ordered that birthday present online because you did not want to deal with the hassle of actually going to the store?  Online retailers, such as Amazon have really taken over!
block_02: While the company Coresight Research reports that there have been around 7,100 store closures this year that have been announced by U.S. retailers, which includes CVS Pharmacy,              CNBC reported that analysts are determining that Amazon Stock could be worth around $2,500 per share in 1 year!
block_03: This just shows that convenience is key and retailers like Amazon will reap all the benefits.  Will Amazon hit that price target?  What will you decide?
